kings_guild.name: The King's Guild
kings_guild.description: Master artisans of the King's Guild each ply a different trade in a different quarter of the city. Work out who's who.
clues: Either Cedric goes with Blacksmith or Eastcheap goes with Godfrey.
Between Aldric and Godfrey, one goes with 5 coins and the other with 13 coins.
More members of the South Side are in the Ironmongers' Guild than members of the North Side.
Rowan, 5 coins, and 9 coins go with Highrow, Riverside, and Southgate, in some order.
3 coins goes with exactly two of Cedric, Tanner, and Highrow.
Either Cedric goes with Blacksmith or someone in the South Side goes with Blacksmith (but not both).
The Blacksmith's levy is higher than both Edmund and the artisan in Southgate.
The Mason's levy is lower than both Cedric and the artisan in Oldwall.
Oldwall goes with at least one of Godfrey, Mason, or 5 coins.
Potter goes with exactly one of Cedric, Bridgegate, or Southgate.
Either Edmund goes with Potter, or Rowan goes with 5 coins — but not both.
If the Carpenter belongs to the River Ward, then no one in the Joiners' Guild goes with Rowan.

fishing.name: The Fishing Derby
fishing.description: Anglers at the lake-country derby each landed a different fish from a different pond on a different lure. Work out who caught what, and where.
clues: Either Dale goes with Bass or Foxglen goes with Mabel.
Between Boone and Mabel, one goes with 5 lb and the other with 13 lb.
More members of the Lowland Basin are in the Pike Family than members of the South Watershed.
Wade, 5 lb, and 9 lb go with Mossbank, Stillwater, and Willowmere, in some order.
3 lb goes with exactly two of Dale, Trout, and Mossbank.
Either Dale goes with Bass or someone in the Lowland Basin goes with Bass (but not both).
The angler who landed the Bass' weight is higher than both Esther and the angler at Willowmere.
The angler who landed the Crappie's weight is lower than both Dale and the angler at Pinehollow.
Pinehollow goes with at least one of Mabel, Crappie, or 5 lb.
Perch goes with exactly one of Dale, Cedarmere, or Willowmere.
Either Esther goes with Perch, or Wade goes with 5 lb — but not both.
If the angler who landed the Bluegill belongs to the East Watershed, then no one in the Catfish Family goes with Wade.
